extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon bridged to early break on final climb, then attacked solo in final kilometers to gain time on GC rivals including dropped VALVERDE.
tactical_patterns: YATES bridged to QUINTANA break after Movistar set pace, exploiting domestique work for own GC benefit.
VALVERDE punctured after raising arm for assistance, Movistar's pace-setting backfired when leader mechanicaled under pressure.
Sky's FROOME unable to follow YATES bridge despite team control, weakness exposed on final mountain stage.
PINOT used YATES bridge group as screen before attacking for stage win in final kilometers.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: bridged to break despite being marked GC threat, then held time gaps proving peak form
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: punctured after signaling mechanical issues, couldn't respond when rivals attacked despite team setting pace
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: appeared spent force but may have waited for VALVERDE, ambiguous strength on climb
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: under pressure and couldn't follow YATES bridge despite Sky's resources
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: took second stage win after using break as tactical screen, legs returned post-Covadonga
